name: MariaDB Development Environment
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y mariadb-server mariadb-client
postStartCommand: sudo service mariadb start || sudo service mariadb restart; sudo mariadb -uroot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS dev_db; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'dev'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'password'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON dev_db.* TO 'dev'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" 2>/dev/null || true
